gameDescription.mainText: Super Traffic Racer is a high-speed endless racing game where you dodge traffic, earn coins, and unlock new cars. Drive through highways packed with vehicles and test your reflexes as you aim for the highest score.

highlights.title: Endless Racing Challenge
highlights.text: Race endlessly on a highway filled with cars, trucks, and buses. The longer you drive without crashing, the higher your score!

highlights.title: Wide Car Selection
highlights.text: Unlock and drive a variety of vehicles, from compact city cars to high-speed sports cars, each with unique handling.

highlights.title: Upgrades and Customization
highlights.text: Upgrade your car's speed, braking, and handling or change its look with cool paint jobs and decals.

features.title: Realistic Traffic Simulation
features.description: Navigate through dense traffic with realistic AI vehicles. Each lane is packed with unpredictable drivers.

features.title: Multiple Game Modes
features.description: Choose between One-Way, Two-Way, Time Attack, and Free Ride modes to test your driving skills.

features.title: Vehicle Upgrades
features.description: Use the coins you collect to enhance your vehicle’s speed, acceleration, and control for better performance.

features.title: Day and Night Cycle
features.description: Experience immersive visuals with dynamic day and night settings as you race through the highway.
